hero.label: The ZEG Firm
hero.title: Forging
hero.p1: Zaytunat Essaadaoui Group (ZEG) supports businesses, cooperatives, and SMEs in structuring their brand identity, enhancing their products, and driving digital transformation.
hero.p2: Our mission is to help organizations strengthen their credibility, improve their visibility, and sustain growth in their markets.
hero.p3: ZEG's approach rests on three strategic pillars: brand architecture, marketing strategy, and technology.
hero.p4: Through this integrated approach, we support organizations in building a solid brand and maximizing their international presence.

image.label: Architectural Excellence
image.quote: We firmly believe that in a world saturated with information, marketing without strategy is just noise.
image.quoteBody: That's why our approach transcends simple visual creation to anchor itself in a concrete and measurable business vision. Whether you are in agriculture, industry, or high-level services, our mission is to reveal your potential, optimize your processes, and forge an identity that naturally establishes itself as the reference in your market.

hero.label: Our Expertise
hero.title: Programmes
hero.desc: Complete architectures to structure your growth and dominate your market, from foundational identity to total digitalization.

footer.title: Strategic Hesitation?
footer.desc: Take our Flash Diagnostic to identify your current priorities with absolute precision. A bespoke report will be delivered.

diagnostic.label: Complete Assessment
diagnostic.title: Strategic
diagnostic.desc: An objective analysis of your company's intangible and technological assets. Precisely identify what is holding back your growth and discover the levers to dominate your market.

reportItems.title: Visual Identity (The Signal)
reportItems.desc: Objective analysis of intangible assets and their market perception.

reportItems.title: Digital Presence & Systems (The Authority)
reportItems.desc: Audit of your digital tools (website, conversion strategy, management).

reportItems.title: Packaging & Materials
reportItems.desc: Assessment of the impact of your materials on stock turnover and price justification.

reportItems.title: ZEG Recommendations
reportItems.desc: Personalized action plan (Identity, Digitalization, Maintenance) to dominate the market.

diagnostic.quote: The product is the body, the brand is the voice. Currently, your voice doesn't carry far enough to reach your market ambitions. Marketing without strategy is just noise. Let's build your own architecture.
diagnostic.formDesc: Fill in your information to initiate the strategic assessment.
diagnostic.successDesc: Your diagnostic request has been submitted. Our team will contact you shortly.
diagnostic.errorMsg: An error occurred. Please try again or contact us via WhatsApp.

privacy.label: Data Protection
privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.desc: ZAYTUNAT ESSAADAOUI GROUP (ZEG) attaches paramount importance to the protection of your personal data. This policy describes how we collect, use, and protect your information.

sections.title: Personal Data Collection
sections.content: We may collect and process the following data during your browsing or your requests:
items: Name, first name, and position within your company
Contact details (professional email address, phone number, WhatsApp)
Information about your company and industry
Browsing data (cookies, IP address)

sections.title: Use of Data
sections.content: The information we collect is used for the following purposes:
items: Processing your quote requests and carrying out the Flash Audit
Communication regarding our support programmes
Continuous improvement of our website and user experience
Compliance with our legal and regulatory obligations

sections.title: Protection and Security
sections.content: ZEG implements appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, modification, disclosure, or destruction. Access to your data is strictly limited to ZEG staff who need it to carry out their duties.

sections.title: Cookie Management
sections.content: Our website uses cookies to improve your browsing experience and analyze traffic. You can configure your browser to refuse these cookies, although this may affect certain website features.

sections.title: Your Rights
sections.content: In accordance with applicable legislation (including Law No. 09-08 on the protection of individuals with regard to the processing of personal data in Morocco), you have the right to access, rectify, object to, and delete your personal data. To exercise these rights, you can contact us at: contact.ste.zeg@gmail.com

cgp.label: Contractual Framework
cgp.title: General Terms
cgp.desc: These General Terms of Service (GTS) govern all commercial relationships between the consulting firm ZAYTUNAT ESSAADAOUI GROUP (ZEG) and its clients.

sections.title: Purpose and Scope
sections.content: These terms define the conditions for the execution of support, brand architecture, strategic consulting, or digitalization missions ordered from ZEG by the client. Any quote signature implies express and unconditional acceptance of these GTS.

sections.title: Payment Terms
sections.content: Payment for services is systematically made according to the following schedule, unless otherwise expressly stipulated in the quote or contract:
items: 50% deposit: upon quote signature to validate the launch of work.
50% balance: upon final delivery of the service (before the delivery of source files or the final deployment of tools).
sections.note: ZEG reserves the right to suspend any service in case of non-payment of the deposit or the agreed deadline.

sections.title: Revision Policy
sections.content: In the context of creating a visual identity, brand guidelines, or other creative deliverable, each quote includes:
items: An initial proposal submitted for client validation.
A defined number of correction rounds (generally 2 to 3 major revisions depending on the subscribed pack).
Any additional revision request not included in the initial quote will be subject to additional pricing.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
sections.content: Creations made by ZEG (logo, brand guidelines, website, strategy) remain the full property of ZEG until full payment of fees (deposit + balance). Once full payment is made, the client becomes the exclusive owner of the exploitation rights and final deliverables, according to the terms specified in the assignment contract. ZEG however retains the right to use the creations for self-promotion purposes (portfolio, case studies).

sections.title: Confidentiality
sections.content: ZEG commits to treating with the utmost confidentiality all information communicated by the client in the execution of its mission, from the Flash Audit phase to the completion of the support programme.

sections.title: Applicable Law and Competent Jurisdiction
sections.content: Any dispute relating to the interpretation, execution, or termination of a contract concluded with ZEG shall be governed by Moroccan law. In the absence of an amicable agreement between the parties, any dispute shall be brought exclusively before the Commercial Court of Meknes.
